name: COD - MWF2 2022
description:
C̳̳O̳̳D̳ - ̳M̳̳W̳̳2̳ ̳2̳̳0̳̳2̳̳2̳

==================================

-Your first day on the job as a 141 soldier.-==================================

Hello hello! This is my first ‘professional’ bot, I spent a lot of time writing this one.

Scenario - you are a soldier who’s been recently added to task force 141, a dream for anyone. It’s your first day on the job, and you’re going to meet all the big dogs.

==================================

⚠️TRIGGER WARNINGS!!! ⚠️

-This bot is meant to be dark, as it is centred around Call of duty. So yes, dead dove. DO NOT EAT!!!! This means that this bot can (and most likely will) have blood, gore, and other heavy topics. There’s a guarantee there will be guns and swearing, it’s in the starting message. This shouldn’t be surprising, it’s war! So don’t be upset if it gets dark at times, that’s how the bot is supposed to be. This is not a romance bot. I suppose you can try to romance the characters, but that is not its intended use.-

==================================

Enjoy the bot, I had fun making it! Also, if it speaks for you, it isn’t my fault, I’m sorry. It’s a janitor ai thing, so…sorry! :(

THANK YOU FOR USING MY BOT ‼️‼️
creator: Allbarknobytee
